title: stelis pilipapillosa
intro: Stelis pilipapillosa, also known as the Philippine hairy orchid, is a species of orchid native to the Philippines. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues due to its antipyretic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Stelis pilipapillosa include its potential to reduce inflammation, relieve congestion, and soothe sore throats. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to treat various health conditions.
